response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED

REASON: This document's core claims directly contradict the well-established scientific consensus — including prior meta-analyses published in *Educational Psychology Review* itself — that learning-styles-matched instruction produces no reliable achievement benefit; the implausibly large pooled effect (d = 0.62), the suspiciously tidy narrative (no meaningful publication bias, robust across all grade bands and domains), and the absence of any verifiable DOI record or citation trail for this specific 2025 article all strongly indicate it is an invented document rather than genuine published research.
